# Fixture: p6c_work_experience_escalate
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 8.8s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Jerold! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: I can't get in the app because the app wants me to upload my job experience
Concierge: That sounds like a bug with the work experience screen. Quit the app fully and reopen it — that usually fixes it.
Partner: I already did that and it still won't let me

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
If it's still not working after reopening, email support@shiftsmart.com and let them know you're stuck on the work experience step.
